subject: ASAP: Java Developer – Java
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Bankry
ROLE: Mid Java Developer
START: ASAP
DURATION: 6 months
LOCATION: Stockholm / on-site
RATE: 850 SEK/h

The team works primarily with Java, GCP, Docker Compose, Oracle and PyTorch.

Key requirements:
• Java
• GCP
• Docker Compose
• Oracle
• PyTorch

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Viktor Olsson
Tech Recruitment Lead
ByteForce
Tel: +46 76 677 89 01
